name: Cafe Younes
description: Lebanon's oldest and most beloved coffee roastery, serving exceptional coffee since 1935. Known for their signature Lebanese coffee blends and cozy atmosphere.

gift_cards.name: 50,000 LBP Store Credit
gift_cards.description: Use this credit for any coffee, pastry, or retail purchase at Cafe Younes.

gift_cards.name: 100,000 LBP Store Credit
gift_cards.description: Perfect for sharing the love of Lebanese coffee. Use for any purchase at Cafe Younes.

gift_cards.name: Signature Coffee Box Gift
gift_cards.description: A curated selection of Cafe Younes' finest coffee blends - the perfect gift for coffee lovers.

name: Em Sherif
description: An iconic Lebanese fine dining restaurant celebrating authentic Lebanese cuisine with a modern twist. Award-winning dishes and an unforgettable dining experience.

gift_cards.name: $50 Dining Credit
gift_cards.description: Treat someone special to an unforgettable Lebanese fine dining experience at Em Sherif.

gift_cards.name: $100 Dining Credit
gift_cards.description: The ultimate gift for food lovers - enjoy the finest Lebanese cuisine at Em Sherif.

gift_cards.name: Mezze Tasting Experience
gift_cards.description: A private mezze tasting experience for two - savour 20+ authentic Lebanese dishes.

name: Aïshti
description: Lebanon's premier luxury lifestyle destination, housing international designer brands and offering a world-class shopping experience since 1991.

gift_cards.name: $100 Shopping Credit
gift_cards.description: Shop the latest designer collections at Aïshti with this store credit gift card.

gift_cards.name: $250 Shopping Credit
gift_cards.description: Indulge in luxury fashion and lifestyle products at Lebanon's finest department store.

name: Bliss House Spa
description: A sanctuary of relaxation in the heart of Beirut. Offering world-class spa treatments, massages, and beauty services in a serene environment.

gift_cards.name: Relaxation Package
gift_cards.description: A 90-minute relaxation package including a full body massage and facial treatment.

gift_cards.name: $50 Spa Credit
gift_cards.description: Let your loved one choose their perfect treatment from our full spa menu.

gift_cards.name: Couples Retreat
gift_cards.description: An exclusive couples spa experience including side-by-side massages, jacuzzi access, and champagne.
